info.title: Nyne AI
info.description: Nyne AI person enrichment and people-search workflows exposed through PaySponge with x402 billing. This bundled spec preserves the live PaySponge payment metadata and adds the documented Nyne request and response bodies for the currently registered x402 routes only: POST /person/enrichment, GET /person/enrichment, and POST /person/search.

post.description: Look up a known person from email, phone number, social profile URL, or name. The PaySponge wrapper handles billing through x402, so callers do not send Nyne's upstream X-API-Key or X-API-Secret headers to this endpoint.

200.description: Enrichment request accepted or completed successfully.

result.bio: John Smith is a software engineer with expertise in web development and cloud technologies.

newsfeed.content: Excited to announce our new product launch!

example.message: At least one of email, phone, social_media_url, or name is required.

403.description: Feature access or subscription restriction from the upstream Nyne workflow.

get.description: Check the status of a previously submitted person enrichment request by request_id. The live PaySponge wrapper advertises this poll route with x402 metadata and the same upstream result shape as the original Nyne status endpoint.

parameters.name: request_id
parameters.description: Request identifier returned from the earlier POST /person/enrichment call.

result.bio: John Smith is a software engineer with expertise in web development and cloud technologies.

post.summary: Run or continue a natural-language people search
post.description: Search for people with a natural-language query, or continue a previous search by resubmitting a request_id or cursor. Nyne's upstream docs also describe GET /person/search polling, but the current PaySponge purchase service does not register that route and returns 404 there as of May 4, 2026. Use POST /person/search with request_id or cursor for continuation on the live x402 wrapper.

body.query: Sales managers at Fortune 500 companies in San Francisco

premiumSearch.summary: Premium search with contact enrichment and relevance signals

value.query: Software engineers at Fortune 500 companies in San Francisco with machine learning experience

continueWithCursor.summary: Continue a prior search with a pagination cursor

200.description: Search completed successfully or returned a cached page of results.

results.headline: Senior Sales Manager
results.bio: Experienced sales leader with 15+ years in enterprise software sales.

insights.overall_summary: Highly relevant match - experienced sales leader at Fortune 500 company in target location
insights.query_insights: Strong match for sales manager role with extensive enterprise experience

example.message: The query parameter is required unless cursor or request_id is provided.

PersonEnrichmentRequest.description: Nyne person enrichment request. At least one of email, phone, social_media_url, or name must be supplied.

social_media_url.description: Social profile URL such as LinkedIn or Twitter.

callback_url.description: Webhook URL for asynchronous completion delivery.

newsfeed.description: Optional list of social sources to fetch recent newsfeed data from.

ai_enhanced_search.description: Enable a slower AI-powered deep search for additional social profiles and data.

lite_enrich.description: Return only a lightweight subset of profile fields.

probability_score.description: Enable probabilistic matching scores intended for human review workflows.

name.description: Expected person name to guide selection, or the primary input when searching by name only.

required_fields.description: Fields that must be present in the final enrichment result.

PersonSearchRequest.description: Nyne person search request. Query is required unless request_id or cursor is provided to continue an earlier search.

query.description: Natural-language description of the people to find.

limit.description: Maximum number of results to return.

offset.description: Zero-based starting position. Offset plus limit cannot exceed 1000.

cursor.description: Opaque next_cursor value from an earlier response.

request_id.description: Earlier Nyne request id to continue or replay cached search results.

force_new.description: Force a new search instead of reusing cached results.

insights.description: Include AI-generated insights about each result. Ignored for light searches.

high_freshness.description: Prioritize recently updated profiles. Ignored for light searches.

profile_scoring.description: Include an AI relevance score per result.

custom_filters.description: Structured filters for precise targeting. The upstream docs reference a separate custom filter section; unlisted fields are preserved here as a free-form object.
